nodes.name: Cron 05:00 MSK
nodes.notes:
0 2 * * * UTC = 05:00 Europe/Moscow (ТЗ §2.6).
Cron задаётся здесь, не в GetConfig.
На ОПЭ: 0 10 * * * UTC = 13:00 МСК.

nodes.name: Execute GetConfig
nodes.notes: Phase 1 INIT. ADR-004: JSON-конфиг + Validate (не rpa_config из БД).

nodes.name: Execute InitTables
nodes.notes: Phase 1 INIT. TDR §6.3: idempotent CREATE SCHEMA/TABLE.

nodes.name: Execute LoadMappings
nodes.notes: TDR v3 §6.5: загрузка mappings/*.json из git (HTTP). Требует GitRawBaseURL в GetConfig.

parameters.query:
SELECT a.agent_login
FROM n8n_breaks_recovery.agents a
INNER JOIN n8n_breaks_recovery.recovery_transactions t ON t.agent_id = a.id
WHERE t.shift_date = ((NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')::date + 1)
  AND t.processing_status IN ('success', 'skipped_BE2', 'skipped_BE3');

nodes.name: Get Processed Agents
nodes.notes:
ТЗ §4.5 шаг 3: пропуск финализированных на D+1 (success, skipped_BE2/BE3).
failed/in_progress — повторная обработка в тот же день.
Credential: RPA DB.
alwaysOutputData: при 0 строк передаёт пустой item дальше.

nodes.name: Continue Phase 2
nodes.notes: Якорь потока после Get Processed Agents: 0 обработанных на D+1 — норма, Phase 2 идёт дальше.

nodes.name: Extract Support Skills
nodes.notes: WF1-00: навыки из mappings/fte_groups.json + news_exception_skills.json (TDR v3 §6.5).

parameters.jsCode:
const skills = [
  ...new Set(
    $('Extract Support Skills')
      .all()
      .map((item) => item.json.skill_name)
      .filter(Boolean),
  ),
];

if (skills.length === 0) {
  throw new Error('System Error: support skills list is empty (mappings/fte_groups.json)');
}

const values = skills
  .map((name) => `('${String(name).replace(/'/g, "''")}')`)
  .join(',\n    ');

const query = `WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')::date AS run_date,
    ((NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')::date + 1) AS shift_date
),
support_skills(skill_name) AS (
  VALUES
    ${values}
),
activities_msk AS (
  SELECT
    u.login AS agent_login,
    (usa.start AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' + INTERVAL '3 hours')::date AS start_msk_date,
    (usa.end AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' + INTERVAL '3 hours')::date AS end_msk_date
  FROM user_schedule_activity usa
  INNER JOIN "user" u ON u.id = usa.user_id
  WHERE usa.start IS NOT NULL
    AND usa.end IS NOT NULL
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM user_skill_mapping usm
      INNER JOIN skill sk ON sk.id = usm.skill_id
      INNER JOIN support_skills ss ON ss.skill_name = sk.name
      WHERE usm.user_id = u.id
    )
)
SELECT
  am.agent_login,
  to_char(p.shift_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shift_date,
  BOOL_OR(am.start_msk_date = p.run_date AND am.end_msk_date >= p.shift_date) AS is_night_shift
FROM activities_msk am
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE am.start_msk_date = p.shift_date
   OR am.end_msk_date = p.shift_date
   OR (am.start_msk_date < p.shift_date AND am.end_msk_date > p.shift_date)
GROUP BY am.agent_login, p.shift_date, p.run_date
ORDER BY am.agent_login;`;

return [{ json: { query, support_skills_count: skills.length } }];

nodes.name: Build WF1 Query
nodes.notes: Собирает WF1-01 с фильтром навыков из mappings/fte_groups.json.

nodes.name: Get Agents D+1
nodes.notes: ТЗ §4.5 шаг 3 / TDR §7.1 оп.1. WFM DB read-only. WF1-01 + фильтр fte_groups.json. Сбой -> BE1.

nodes.name: Filter New Agents
nodes.notes:
ТЗ §4.5 шаг 3: исключить обработанных на D+1.
processed_agents — снимок из Continue Phase 2 (тот же execution). Агенты — $input от Get Agents D+1.

nodes.name: Process Each Agent

// ТЗ §4.5 шаг 12: строки пакета загрузки (TDR §7.2 JSON)
return $input.all();

nodes.name: Add to Batch
nodes.notes: Шаг 12.

parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    $1::varchar AS agent_login,
    $2::date AS shift_date,
    $3::boolean AS is_night_shift,
    NULLIF($4::text, '') AS error_code,
    NULLIF($5::text, '') AS processing_comment
),
upsert_agent AS (
  INSERT INTO n8n_breaks_recovery.agents (agent_login)
  SELECT agent_login FROM input
  ON CONFLICT (agent_login) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
),
agent_row AS (
  SELECT id FROM upsert_agent
  UNION ALL
  SELECT a.id
  FROM n8n_breaks_recovery.agents a
  INNER JOIN input i ON a.agent_login = i.agent_login
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO n8n_breaks_recovery.recovery_transactions (
  processing_start_time,
  processing_end_time,
  processing_status,
  processing_comment,
  agent_id,
  shift_date,
  is_night_shift,
  error_code
)
SELECT
  NOW(),
  CASE WHEN i.error_code IS NOT NULL THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
  CASE
    WHEN i.error_code IS NULL THEN 'in_progress'
    WHEN i.error_code = 'BE2' THEN 'skipped_BE2'
    WHEN i.error_code = 'BE3' THEN 'skipped_BE3'
    ELSE 'failed'
  END,
  i.processing_comment,
  (SELECT id FROM agent_row),
  i.shift_date,
  i.is_night_shift,
  i.error_code
FROM input i
ON CONFLICT (agent_id, shift_date) DO UPDATE SET
  processing_status = EXCLUDED.processing_status,
  processing_end_time = EXCLUDED.processing_end_time,
  processing_comment = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.processing_comment, recovery_transactions.processing_comment),
  error_code = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.error_code, recovery_transactions.error_code),
  is_night_shift = EXCLUDED.is_night_shift
RETURNING id AS transaction_id, agent_id, processing_status;

nodes.name: Write Transaction
nodes.notes: Credential: RPA DB ONLY (TDR §7.3). ADR-006: INSERT agents ON CONFLICT + recovery_transactions (agent_id). Параметризованный SQL. Сбой -> SE1.

nodes.name: Send MM Notification
nodes.notes: ЗАГЛУШКА Phase 5. 1C Bot API (R-09). Конфиг из Execute LoadMappings.

nodes.name: Trigger WF-2
nodes.notes: ТЗ §4.5 / ADR-001: Execute Workflow после завершения WF-1.

parameters.content:
## BreaksRecovery_Main

Reframework WF-1 · **Error Workflow:** BreaksRecovery_8.ErrorHandler

ТЗ §4.5 · TDR §3, §7

## PHASE 1 — INIT

ТЗ §4.5 шаги 1–2 · TDR §6.3, §6.5

Cron → GetConfig → LoadMappings → InitTables

Credential: RPA DB (InitTables)

## PHASE 2 — GET DATA

ТЗ §4.5 шаг 3 · TDR §7.1

Get Processed Agents → Continue Phase 2 → Skills → WF1 Query → Get Agents D+1 → Filter

Credentials: RPA + WFM read-only

## PHASE 3 — PROCESS

ТЗ §4.5 шаги 7–13 · loop (1 агент = 1 транзакция)

Контейнер → новости → слоты → BE2/BE3 → Add to Batch → Write Transaction

~ Code-заглушки; TODO SQL WFM шаги 4–6

## PHASE 5 — FINISH

ТЗ §4.5 шаги 18–20 · §4.9

Send MM Notification → Trigger WF-2 (ADR-001)

Mattermost Bot (~ Continue On Fail)

## PHASE 4 — UPLOAD WFMS

ТЗ §4.5 шаги 15–18 · TDR §7.2

**Пусто** (ревью 24.06): HTTP-заглушки удалены.
Реализация — после WF-1 логики 8–12.
